title: Log calls on the go with the monday sales CRM mobile app

posts.author: sashawe (Sasha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey community! I’m Sasha, from the monday sales CRM team and I’m excited to start bringing you some more information and tips about monday sales CRM.

First up, let’s talk mobile. Did you know that you can access monday sales CRM from your phone?

Here are the details:
The monday sales CRM mobile app makes it super easy to log calls on the go. With just one click an automatic summary screen will pop up and include quick responses to make sure that even when you’re out and about, no information slips through the cracks. See this feature in action in the video below and check out this article for more information.

Have you tried the app? If so, tell us how you feel about it below!

https://dapulse-res.cloudinary.com/video/upload/q_auto,f_auto,cs_copy/remote_mondaycom_static/video/video-library/CRM/call_summey_desktop.mp4

posts.author: LiSchuhm (Lilli Schuhmacher)
posts.cookedHtml: @sashawe Hello! Just joined Monday CRM a few months ago. Is the Sales CRM app still active or is there some kind of replacement? I am looking for call logging features
